zh.lifeSummary: 當Mabel de Muscegros於1243年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親Sir Robert de Mucegros, Knight36歲，母親Hawise Malet41歲。她於大約1260年與John Hervey結婚。她去世於1284年之前在英國英格蘭素福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mabel de Muscegros于1243年出生在英国越可爾时，她的父亲Sir Robert de Mucegros, Knight36岁，母亲Hawise Malet41岁。她于大约1260年与John Hervey结婚。她去世于1284年之前在英国英格兰素福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname from the Old French vocabulary word amabel, amable ‘lovely’ (akin to modern English amiable ‘friendly, good-humoured’). The initial vowel began to be lost as early as the 12th century (the same woman is referred to as both Mabilia and Amabilia in a document of 1185 ), but a short vowel in the resulting first syllable was standard, giving a rhyme with babble, until the 19th century, when people began to pronounce the name to rhyme with table.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Mabel de Muscegros was born in 1243, in Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Robert de Mucegros, Knight, was 36 and her mother, Hawise Malet, was 41. She married John Hervey about 1260. She died before 1284, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mabel de Muscegros est née en 1243, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert de Mucegros, Knight, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Hawise Malet, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé John Hervey environ 1260. Elle est décédée avant 1284, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mabel de Muscegros 1243 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert de Mucegros, Knight 36 und ihre Mutter Hawise Malet 41. Sie hat um 1260 John Hervey geheiratet. Sie starb vor 1284 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mabel de Muscegros è nata il nel 1243 nel Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir Robert de Mucegros, Knight, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Hawise Malet, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato John Hervey circa 1260. Morì prima del 1284, nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Mabel de Muscegrosが1243年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Mucegros, Knightは36歳，母Hawise Maletは41歳であった。約1260年にJohn Herveyと結婚した。彼女は1284年以前にイギリスイギリススフォルクで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mabel de Muscegros(이)가 1243년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert de Mucegros, Knight(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise Malet(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 대략 1260년 John Hervey(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1284년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mabel de Muscegros nasceu em 1243, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert de Mucegros, Knight, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Hawise Malet, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com John Hervey aproximadamente 1260. Ela faleceu antes 1284, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mabel de Muscegros родилась в 1243 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert de Mucegros, Knight было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise Malet, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Hervey около 1260 г. Она умерла перед 1284 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mabel de Muscegros nació en 1243, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert de Mucegros, Knight, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Hawise Malet, tenía 41 años. Se casó con John Hervey aproximadamente 1260. Murió antes de 1284, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
